Sections.SectionDescription: Pick the body shape for your currently controlled character. Armor and clothing are refitted automatically; the choice is stored per character in your savegame.

Settings.Name: Body shape
Settings.Description: Applies immediately to your currently controlled character when changed (same effect as the !cm_setbody console command). Switch characters and change it again to set other party members.

Settings.Name: Re-apply on save load
Settings.Description: If enabled, the body shape above is re-applied to your controlled character every time a save finishes loading. Leave OFF to let each save keep its own per-character choices.
